prompt: You have an open-ended straight draw. How many unseen cards complete the straight?
why_v1: An open-ended straight draw has 8 outs because four cards on each end can complete it.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. An open-ended straight draw has 8 outs.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Count both ends of the straight: an open-ended straight draw has 8 outs.
